title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted water according to package instructions.
Fry pancetta with garlic until crisp.
Beat eggs with Parmesan and pepper.
Drain pasta, add to pan with pancetta, remove from heat.
Stir in egg mixture quickly, serve immediately.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 1 hour.
Grill or bake chicken until cooked.
Sauté onion, garlic, ginger, add tomatoes and cook down.
Add cream and butter, then add chicken.
Simmer for 10 minutes, serve with rice or naan.

title: Margherita Pizza
summary: Fresh pizza with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and basil.
instructions: Roll out dough, spread tomato sauce.
Tear mozzarella and scatter over sauce.
Top with basil leaves and drizzle olive oil.
